name: capture-heights-rect
description: snapshot terrain heights in a rectangle into _G.__mcpHB (pair with restore-heights-rect)
lua: local terr = g_terrainNode if terr == nil or not entityExists(terr) then local r = getRootNode() for i = 0, getNumOfChildren(r) - 1 do local c = getChildAt(r, i) if getName(c) == "terrain" then terr = c break end end end __mcpHB = {x1=ARGS.x1, z1=ARGS.z1, x2=ARGS.x2, z2=ARGS.z2, step=ARGS.step, h={}} local i = 1 for x = ARGS.x1, ARGS.x2, ARGS.step do for z = ARGS.z1, ARGS.z2, ARGS.step do __mcpHB.h[i] = getTerrainHeightAtWorldPos(terr, x, 0, z) i = i + 1 end end return "captured " .. (i - 1) .. " heights in (" .. ARGS.x1 .. "," .. ARGS.z1 .. ")..(" .. ARGS.x2 .. "," .. ARGS.z2 .. ")"
